mapper.sql: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.user_id AS userId, c.content, c.is_chtholly AS isChtholly, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.handle AS authorHandle, u.avatar AS authorAvatar FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, content, is_chtholly) VALUES (#{id}, #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{isChtholly})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE is_chtholly = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{since}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' AND p.publish_time >= #{since} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND c.is_chtholly = 1 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
